hooks.command: git pull --ff-only || echo "[session] pull pulou: branch divergente ou alteracoes locais — sincronize a mao"

D=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && V="$(dirname "$D")/vvcore" && { if [ -d "$V/.git" ]; then git -C "$V" pull --ff-only || echo "[vvcore] pull pulou (divergente/local) — sincronize o vvcore a mao"; else git clone https://github.com/fabiozaffani/vvcore.git "$V"; fi; } && bash "$V/bin/setup-links.sh" || echo "[vvcore] bootstrap pulou"
